description: Use this API to get rating character extension data. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.1.0. ierr, cval = get_ext_rating_char(irate, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the extension rating field desired. (input).

error_codes.description: Bad data type for field ‘STRING’; ‘CVAL’ not returned.
Unknown error with data access; ‘CVAL’ not returned.
API Prereqs not met; ‘CVAL’ not returned.
